subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the Self-Subsisting. His is the bounty and grace; He quickeneth whomsoever He willeth through His sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو العزیز القیوم له الجود و الفضل یحیی من یشاء بسلطانه
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
